message: Node started: Verify the derived formula for the De Giorgi exponent by calculating the specific values for the following six cases: 3D Navier-Stokes (n=3, s=1), 2D Navier-Stokes (n=2, s=1), 1D Burgers (n=1, s=1), Surface Quasi-Geostrophic equation (SQG) (n=2, s=1/2), Magnetohydrodynamics (MHD) (n=3, s=1), and fractional Navier-Stokes (n=3, s arbitrary). Ensure the formula correctly predicts the critical scaling for each.
